planned_actions: [SKILL-1] intake/SKILL.md: Remove lines 111-114 that instruct agents to manually include version/artifact_type/artifact_id/producer_type. Add a note that envelope fields are auto-injected by CLI. Keep the schema field reference section (lines 114-118) since those are content fields agents must know.

[SKILL-2] task-compiler/SKILL.md: Update the Output section example (lines 207-251) to remove envelope fields (version, artifact_type, artifact_id, producer_type, created_at) from the example JSON. Add a note: Run geas schema template task_contract for the full template. Keep content fields (task_id, title, goal, etc).
[SKILL-3] task-compiler/references/examples.md: Update all 2 example TaskContract JSON blocks to remove envelope fields. Keep content fields. Add note that envelope fields are auto-injected by CLI.
[SKILL-4] evidence-gate/SKILL.md: Update the gate_result template in Output section (lines 222-257) to remove envelope fields from the example. Add reference to geas schema template gate_result.
[SKILL-5] verify-fix-loop/SKILL.md: Update the DecisionRecord template (lines 126-143) to remove envelope fields. Add reference to geas schema template decision_record.

[SKILL-6] mission/references/specifying.md: Update phase_review template (lines 247-270) to remove envelope fields (version, artifact_type, artifact_id, producer_type). Add reference to geas schema template phase_review.
[SKILL-7] mission/references/evolving.md: Update phase_review template (lines 250-268) to remove envelope fields. Add reference to geas schema template phase_review.

[TEST-1] Create src/cli/test/schema-template.test.js: Test that geas schema template generates valid templates for all schema types (task_contract, gate_result, decision_record, phase_review, mission_spec, design_brief, evidence). Verify each template contains required content fields but NOT envelope fields (those are auto-injected).

[TEST-2] Create src/cli/test/envelope-injection.test.js: Test envelope auto-injection behavior: (a) CLI auto-injects version/artifact_type/producer_type when missing, (b) no-clobber — existing values are preserved, (c) status defaults to drafted when not provided.

[TEST-3] Create src/cli/test/validation-hints.test.js: Test validation error messages for common failure patterns from previous sessions: (a) required field missing produces hint naming the field, (b) invalid enum value produces hint listing valid values, (c) additionalProperties violation produces hint naming the unexpected field.
[TEST-4] Add npm test script to package.json pointing to the test runner (node --test or a simple runner that executes all test/*.test.js files).
edge_cases: Skill files that reference envelope fields in prose explanations (not just templates) — update prose too, not just JSON blocks
Examples that show CLI commands with inline JSON containing envelope fields — update those command examples
Decision record template in verify-fix-loop has created_at which is also auto-injected — remove it from the template
Phase review templates appear in both specifying.md and evolving.md with slightly different content — update both consistently
Test for schema template must handle case where a schema type does not exist — expect clear error
Envelope no-clobber test must verify that user-provided version value is preserved even if it differs from default
Test validation hints for nested required fields (e.g., scope.surfaces inside task_contract)
non_goals: Do NOT remove content field documentation from skills — only envelope fields
Do NOT restructure skill files beyond the specific inline schema changes
Do NOT modify the CLI source code — only write tests against existing CLI behavior
Do NOT add new CLI commands or modify existing command behavior
Do NOT touch skills outside the 7 identified files
Do NOT modify protocol docs or JSON schemas
demo_steps: AC1: For each of the 7 skill files, show that envelope fields (version, artifact_type, artifact_id, producer_type) are no longer listed as agent-provided requirements, and a geas schema template reference exists
AC2: Run the test suite (cd src/cli && npm run build && npm test) and show tests covering: wrong field name gives hint, invalid enum value gives valid options, missing required field names the field
AC3: Run cd src/cli && npm run build && npm test and verify all tests pass with exit code 0
AC4: Verify that existing CLI command examples in skills (e.g., geas task create, geas mission write-spec) still work correctly by checking test output for envelope auto-injection tests

known_risks: Skill file changes reference geas schema template command which must be available at runtime (it is - task-001 implemented it)
untested_paths: Edge cases in skill prose where envelope fields are mentioned in running text vs JSON blocks
self_check.summary: 7 skill files updated, 3 test files created (18 tests), build and all tests pass. Skills now reference CLI auto-injection and schema template command.

closure.change_summary: Updated 7 skill files to remove inline envelope field instructions, replacing with CLI auto-injection notes and geas schema template references. Created 3 test files with 18 regression tests covering schema template generation, envelope injection, and validation error hints. All tests pass.

reviews.summary: Clean separation, envelope fields properly removed, tests comprehensive
18 tests pass, build+bundle work, CLI commands compatible, no inline schemas remain

verdict.rationale: All 4 ACs verified across full evidence chain. 7 skill files cleaned of inline envelope fields with CLI auto-injection references added. 18 regression tests pass covering schema templates, envelope injection, and validation hints. DA approved structural separation, QA confirmed build+bundle+tests. No blocking concerns, no open risks, no debt. Scope matches contract exactly with no creep.

what_went_well: 18 regression tests provide safety net for all 3 new features
Skill cleanup was straightforward - clear pattern of envelope field removal
Tests use node:test built-in runner, no extra dependencies
All 4 tasks completed in sequence with clean handoffs
what_was_surprising: Test files needed to be in src/test/ rather than test/ for TypeScript compilation to work correctly with the existing tsconfig
rule_candidates: Tests should be placed in src/cli/src/test/ for proper TypeScript compilation
next_time_guidance: When creating test files for TypeScript CLI projects, check tsconfig.json include paths first
